'''Isamu''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] in the [[Birjis system/Legends|Birjis system]]. The [[Mu tree]] was native to this moon.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|15|Laughter After Dark (short story)}} {{1st}}
